top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks to tumble as interest rate decision looms; Oil falls as ‘economic catastrophe’ avoided
top_signals.summary: Good morning and welcome back to the City AM liveblog. Interest rates are expected to be left unchanged at 3.75 per cent when Bank of England’s monetary policy committee meets today as rate-setters wait to find out whether the Iran war peace deal holds up.  The Bank’s decision will follow Thursday’s inflation data, which stayed [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran Gears Up to Boost Oil Exports
top_signals.summary: While U.S. President Donald Trump has recently hailed the resumption of oil flows from Gulf allies, Iran, too, appears to be gearing up to resume exports and trading.At least three tankers carrying some five million barrels of Iranian oil have sailed through the U.S.

top_signals.title: Congress seeks to limit US Navy vessels built in foreign shipyards
top_signals.summary: The Senate Armed Services Committee seeks to strip the waiver authority granted to the president to approve offshore ship construction.
